en: Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy, To the church of the Thessalonians in God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ: Grace to you and peace.
zh: 保羅、西拉和提摩太，寫信給帖撒羅尼迦、在父 神和主耶穌基督裡的教會。願恩惠平安臨到你們。

en: We give thanks to God always for all of you, constantly mentioning you in our prayers,
zh: 我們常常為你們眾人感謝 神，禱告的時候提到你們，

en: remembering before our God and Father your work of faith and labor of love and steadfastness of hope in our Lord Jesus Christ.
zh: 在我們的父 神面前，不住地記念你們信心的工作，愛心的勞苦和因盼望我們主耶穌基督而有的堅忍。

en: For we know, brothers loved by God, that he has chosen you,
zh: 神所愛的弟兄們，我們知道你們是蒙揀選的，

en: because our gospel came to you not only in word, but also in power and in the Holy Spirit and with full conviction. You know what kind of men we proved to be among you for your sake.
zh: 因為我們的福音傳到你們那裡，不單是藉著言語，也是藉著權能，藉著聖靈和充足的信心。為了你們的緣故，我們在你們中間為人怎樣，這是你們知道的。

en: And you became imitators of us and of the Lord, for you received the word in much affliction, with the joy of the Holy Spirit,
zh: 你們效法了我們，也效法了主，在大患難中，帶著聖靈的喜樂接受了真道。

en: so that you became an example to all the believers in Macedonia and in Achaia.
zh: 這樣，你們就成了馬其頓和亞該亞所有信徒的榜樣。

en: For not only has the word of the Lord sounded forth from you in Macedonia and Achaia, but your faith in God has gone forth everywhere, so that we need not say anything.
zh: 因為不單主的道從你們那裡傳遍了馬其頓和亞該亞，就是你們對 神的信心也傳遍了各處，所以我們不用再說甚麼了。

en: For they themselves report concerning us the kind of reception we had among you, and how you turned to God from idols to serve the living and true God,
zh: 他們都述說你們是怎樣接待我們，而且怎樣離棄偶像歸向 神，要服事這位又真又活的 神，

en: and to wait for his Son from heaven, whom he raised from the dead, Jesus who delivers us from the wrath to come.
zh: 並且等候他的兒子從天降臨。這就是 神使他從死人中復活，救我們脫離將來的忿怒的那位耶穌。
